key_insight: OISD improves reasoning by using the model’s final layer as an on-policy teacher for intermediate layers, distilling both logits and attention during RL post-training.
engineering_relevance: It offers a practical training recipe for boosting math-reasoning language models without external privileged supervision, while preserving a single acting policy.
method: Use the final layer as a detached internal teacher for selected intermediate layers during rollout and GRPO.
Align intermediate logits to transfer reasoning behavior and align attention patterns to transfer where-to-look signals.
Apply signed advantage-weighted Jensen–Shannon alignment to keep distilled representations policy-consistent.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports substantial, consistent gains over strong reasoning RL baselines on four mathematical reasoning tasks.
watch_item: The method adds alignment losses and layer-selection choices, so stability and compute overhead may depend on careful tuning.
paper_title: OISD: On-Policy Internal Self-Distillation of Language Models
